body_txt: People with crossed eyes or taking on a crossed eyes expression are a Stock Joke in popular culture. They are either seen as silly, crazy or stupid. Expect a cross-eyed character to be either a Cloudcuckoolander or The Ditz . Whenever they appear you may rest assured that they will see double note While this cna be Truth in Television , it isn't always the case. If someone has strabismus since early childhood, their brain usually adapts by ignoring the image coming from the deviating eye. or accidentally drop something out of their hands. They are often The Klutz and may be prone to Amusing Injuries . Can be combined with a goofy voice or with a Maniac Tongue sticking out from under their lips. In Real Life , strabismus is a serious condition and poking fun of it is likely to offend some people, as it's a relatively common disorder. Despite this, it's still an Acceptable Target in most circles, and mockery of strabismus is surprisingly common even in modern media. See also Fish Eyes .
